message:
fix: harden connectors, UI, and installer against edge cases

Connector resilience (clawdbot, cline, pi_agent, vibe):
  Replace anyhow Context-based error propagation with graceful skip-and-
  continue for unreadable session files. Individual corrupt or permission-
  denied files no longer abort the entire scan; instead a tracing::debug
  message is emitted and the file is skipped. This matches the existing
  pattern in the chatgpt connector and prevents one bad file from
  blocking discovery of all other sessions. The pi_agent test for invalid
  UTF-8 is updated to expect a graceful skip rather than an error.

ChatGPT connector (chatgpt.rs):
  Round the float-to-i64 timestamp conversion to avoid off-by-one
  millisecond truncation errors.

Cline connector (cline.rs):
  Use the shared flatten_content helper for message content extraction
  instead of plain as_str(), correctly handling structured content arrays.

Unicode-safe string slicing (verify.rs, wizard.rs, export_modal.rs,
widgets.rs):
  Replace byte-index slicing (&s[..N]) with char-iterator based
  truncation (s.chars().take(N).collect()) across all UI truncation
  points. This prevents panics on multi-byte UTF-8 strings (e.g. CJK
  paths, emoji in titles). Also adds underflow protection for narrow
  terminal widths in centered_rect() and export path display.

Shell injection prevention (install.rs):
  Change RemoteInstaller::with_version to return Result and validate the
  version string against an allowlist of safe characters (alphanumeric,
  '.', '-', '+', '_'). This closes a potential command injection vector
  where a crafted version string could escape shell interpolation.

Vibe connector (vibe.rs):
  Reformat code for clarity (rustfmt compliance) with no logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
